name: input
description: Text input field with label, optional icons (search/action), and helper text. Supports three sizes (large, medium, small) and six states (default, filled, focused, success, danger, disable).

anatomy.notes: Outer wrapper, vertical flex column with gap between head and content
Row containing label text and optional info icon; gap Sizing/XS
Input label text; Large size uses Sizing/Text/Large + Weight/Label Bold; Medium/Small use Sizing/Text/Large or Text/Medium + Weight/Label
Optional info icon button (BOOLEAN prop: Info icon); icon color fg/brand
The visible input container (border + background); contains search icon, content area, action button
Optional leading icon (search icon by default); icon color fg/subtle
Placeholder or input text content; uses Sizing/Text/Medium + Weight/Label
Optional trailing action button / chevron icon; icon color fg/subtle
Optional helper/description text below input box (BOOLEAN prop: Description)

a11y.notes: Uses native <input> element. Label must be associated via htmlFor/id. Disabled state sets aria-disabled and pointer-events:none. Error state should set aria-invalid='true' and associate error message via aria-describedby.
